calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 GAP-B committed-class entropy falsifier on the GAP-A de-collapsed substrate (ARM_STD_G2 conversion lever armed)
items.note: GATED ON + ROUTED BY the confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-654c_2026-06-15 (654c FAIL non_contributory/substrate_ceiling: 666c fixed mint/maintain [max_pairwise_dist 1.711, pool holds >=2 differentiated rules] but crf_frac_active collapsed to 0.0 -- every matched rule gated OUT because the SHARED GAP-A context collapse [consumed_summary spread 0.0089 < 0.05] makes >=3 rules co-match -> gate theta 0.65 > maintenance_floor 0.45). The autopsy gated 654d on GAP-A context DE-COLLAPSE, which has now CLEARED via V3-EXQ-684a PASS (conversion_mechanism_identified; confirmed coordinator DB + manifest). Single-variable ARM_OFF vs ARM_ON (use_candidate_rule_field) on the matched 649/643a/SD-056/SP-CEM/MECH-341 stack + CRF mature+maintenance+persist levers + trained-bias-head P1 (GAP-D), with the 684a-validated ARM_STD_G2 CONVERSION lever ARMED as a matched-stack constant on BOTH arms (modulatory_authority_normalize_basis=std + authority_gain=2.0 + use_modulatory_channel_routing + source=cand_world_summary + candidate_summary_source=e2_world_forward). PRIMARY DV committed-class entropy. Pre-registered non-vacuity preconditions each self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a false weakens): C1a class-axis exercisable; C1b consumed-summary divergence >= floor (the de-collapse must land); C1c crf_frac_active >= 0.30 (gate FIRING -- if de-collapse alone is insufficient this self-routes to the CRF maintenance-theta amend, autopsy part ii, NOT a falsification); C1d propagation non-vacuity. Records crf_n_matched_last (the autopsy discriminator: matched-but-gated-out vs never-matched). THREE-branch map, NO weakens: PASS (C1 + C2 committed-class lift >=2/3) -> supports MECH-309/ARC-062; C1-holds/C2-fails -> shared selection-authority CONVERSION CEILING persisting under ARM_STD_G2 -> non_contributory + /implement-substrate (NOT a falsification); C1-fails -> non_contributory/substrate_not_ready_requeue. claim_ids=[MECH-309,ARC-062] (only PASS weights them as supports). MECH-309/ARC-062 stay candidate/substrate_ceiling/v3_pending; no demotions.

items.title: SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance bridge EVIDENCE re-run on the STABILIZED base harm landscape (5-arm continuous-survival; supersedes 603o)
items.note: Corrected SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance-bridge EVIDENCE re-run on the now-stabilized base harm landscape (failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-603p Branch B). 603o self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue because the base harm landscape was seed-fragile (1/3 seeds). The 2026-06-16 scaffolded_sd054_onboarding harm-pathway STABILIZATION amend (scaffold_harm_pathway_encoder_lr=3e-4 + scaffold_harm_pathway_warmup_steps=250, in ALL 5 arms base config, NOT a global LR raise) now clears harm_eval_range>=0.02 on 3/3 seeds at proximity_harm=0.10 (in-session proof-of-fix validation at reduced budget: ranges [0.0245,0.0541,0.0278], corr 0.70-0.85; seeds 43+44 flipped FAIL->PASS vs 603p). 5-arm continuous-mean-survival primary; the base-harm-landscape harm_eval_range>=0.02 on >=2/3 seeds is RETAINED as the FIRST self-routing non-vacuity precondition (self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue at full scale if under-powered, never a false bridge verdict). claim_ids=[SD-059, MECH-358]; evidence; supersedes 603o. behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-C.
